---
title: "[cc-orchestrate]{.doc-object-name .doc-function .doc-label .doc-label-cli-group}"
body-classes: doc-api-page
sidebar: cli-reference
page-navigation: false
html-table-processing: none
---

# [cc-orchestrate]{.doc-object-name .doc-function .doc-label .doc-label-cli-group}

::: {.doc-subject}
Orchestrate fleets of Claude Code agents across pluggable backends like cmux and superset.
:::

::: {.doc-signature .doc-Kind.FUNCTION}
```bash
cc-orchestrate [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```
:::

::: {.details summary="Full --help output"}

::: {.cli-manpage}

```
Usage: cc-orchestrate [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  Orchestrate fleets of Claude Code agents across pluggable backends like cmux
  and superset.

Options:
  --version  Show the version and exit.
  --help     Show this message and exit.

Commands:
  backends  List supported backends and whether each is installed on this...
```

:::

:::

## Options {.doc-parameters}

::: {.doc-definition-items}
<code><span class="doc-parameter-name">&#45;&#45;version</span></code>
:   Show the version and exit.

:::

## Commands {.doc-parameters}

::: {.doc-definition-items}
<code>[backends]{.doc-parameter-name}</code>
:   [List supported backends and whether each is installed on this machine.](backends.qmd)

:::
